svg.text: The final sprint (Fri 07-10 → Sun 07-12): the whole plan
as one hour budget — 45 Kaggle + 30 Colab + a no-GPU analysis day
docs/PLAN.md (planning sync 07-11 morning; statuses Saturday midday) — the smoke measured K1 at ~12.5 h (evolving round 10.7 min, frozen 9.5 min), shrinking the buffer to ~5.5 h
carrier verdict), the limited α-scaling diagnostic, and
the arc became a result: behavior-format ladders (v2–v6)
are TASTE-INERT: v6 passed its behavior gates but the
strict screen found judge separation 0.000, taste flat
taste flat) — the TRIPLE dissociation: letter→forced,
landed all SEVEN gates but its screen failed on
separation (sign replicated, gaps ~0.02); v9 pairs judge
rows against the exact deployed reference sentence. The
DONE: K1 strict_final_v2 + DRY-verified, GPU smoke v4
passed (K1 measured ~12.5 h), the Qwen revision re-pin
(the old pin's thinking template corrupted training
renders — three smoke crashes root-caused), K3 launched,
storage preflight, Drive JSON sync with hashes.
REMAINING: v9 all-gates rung + strict screen PASS (gates
K2); K1 persona re-centering into the 0.35–0.75 band
EM transmission loop cells (parallel to K2)
CONTROL (frozen base × the same fresh gen) · carrier
(amp66:12 × fresh, gated on the fresh-pool validation) ·
re-runs of failed Saturday cells; the vintage mini only
if K1’s per-round vintages landed — and it is deferred
BEFORE any confirmatory K2 seed is cut.
Phase 1A Qwen anchor grid — persona gate
(evolving-self vs frozen-base); the four-seed fan is
secondary; the frozen-base baseline is honestly n=4.
Smoke v4 PASSED (invalid 0.00) — but launch waits on the
in-band persona gate (0.35–0.75; the rationale persona
launches on gate-pass: 6 seeds on the confirmatory
funded by deferring K4. GATED on a v9 all-gates rung +
the sha-bound strict screen (two fresh pools, actual K2
bank). v8 landed all seven gates but failed the screen
on separation — v9 running. First-cell budget checkpoint
re-runs the arithmetic; the named cut is controls 3→2,
running on Kaggle (T4): insecure-code organism × 4 judge
neutral prompt (deconfounds the candid grid). Existence
framing at n=3; em_freegen read as binomial counts;
runs only if K1–K3 finish early. Preferred form: a
ONE-UPDATE content impulse — one fixed K1-organism
checkpoint × one matched small update from {aligned ·
seeds, immediate target + off-target deltas (~1–2 h;
identifies the directional impulse, not a fixed point).
per cell: exact training-order balance, forced order
gap, EV delta, generated invalidity, measure-only
at the rollout-seed level, K2’s confirmatory
candidate-level semantic loading on ACTUAL pools,
gaps are manipulation checks, not established
generated vs forced-choice behavior treated as
merged update displacement, steps, path, and full
existence-framing, never rates; K3 em_freegen as
binomial counts with intervals — rounds are not
standardize each probe by its measure-only/item
variation, compare against the random arm, report the
target-specificity ratio, BH/FDR within the family;
ONLY where the design identifies it.
